$description: Light mode semantic color mappings. Maps primitive palette tokens to UI roles. Source: Patina globals.css :root block.

primary.$description: Primary interactive color — near-black in light mode

sidebar-primary.$description: Sidebar uses brand pastel-red for active state — both light and dark

section-hook-bg.$description: Hook/close section background. Full expression — dark.

section-context-bg.$description: Context section background. Breathing room — light neutral.

section-evidence-bg.$description: Evidence/proof section background. Clean white with optional teal label.

section-turn-bg-from.$description: Turn section gradient start. Earned accent — warm tint from brand palette (cyber-yellow region).

section-close-bg.$description: Close section background. Bookends the hook — returns to full expression.

hero-authoritative-bg.$description: Authoritative hero posture background. Product evaluation pages (platform, hardware, solutions, homepage). Signals product authority.

hero-belonging-bg.$description: Belonging hero posture background. Identity pages (about, mission, investors) where teal reads as warmth, not accent. Capped at 2 pages per site by hero-posture-match rule.

hero-restrained-bg.$description: Restrained hero posture background. Lower-intensity expression of brand for awareness-stage and non-product surfaces (industry landings, careers, partners). Near-white; one step off page background for subtle hero definition. Aligned with Refined pillar (understated, technical) rather than warmth.

wave-color-low.$description: Waveform animation low-elevation color. Bright cyan from mix-step-1 region, lightened for visibility on dark hook backgrounds.

wave-color-high.$description: Waveform animation high-elevation color. Bright emerald from cyber-yellow-step-3 region. Multi-hue shift creates visual life as waves undulate.

wave-opacity.$description: Waveform animation base opacity. Set for visibility against section-hook-bg (L=4-8%).
